nasb.text: They did not know, however, that Joseph understood, for there was an interpreter between them.

esv.text: They did not know that Joseph understood them, for there was an interpreter between them.

cnv.text: 他們不知道約瑟聽得明白，因為他們中間有人當傳譯。

ccb.text: 他们不知道约瑟听得懂他们的话，因为约瑟是通过翻译跟他们谈话。

csbs.text: 他们并不知道约瑟是能听懂的，因为他们和约瑟之间有人传译。
